The marquee moments that make this the room nobody can skip.

1
01: Headline Moment
Tom Brady × Aescape

The live launch of the Brady Protocol on the summit stage: a world-first reveal in front of the room. Brady is the keystone: his name unlocks F1 drivers, marquee athletes, and the brand room around him.

1
2
02: Flagship Suite
The Longevity Lounge

A Brady-anchored recovery & longevity suite: Aescape, Marriott & Ammortal under one roof. The activation that keeps attendees in the room all day.

2
3
03: Anchor Partner
Cadillac House

America's new F1 team makes Austin its home-soil statement. Cadillac House hosts the room: brand execs and F1 drivers in the same space.

3
4
04: Crown Experience
F1 Paddock Club

Executive trackside access on Friday as the cars hit the track. The money-can't-buy crown of the weekend: reserved for Title sponsors and hand-picked VIPs.

4
The Audience

Curated, capped & senior: the decision-makers everyone else is trying to reach.

150–200+
Vetted executives, capped by design
Value Channels
  • Consumer SaaS / Services: Direct pipeline to $50M–$500M+ Consumer Brands, Sports (founders/CMOs); AM brand programming
  • Defense Tech / Agencies: PM stage with DIU / NASA + elite teams, Cadillac / Andretti halo; Human Performance Problem Set Discussions
  • Consumer Brands (Wellness / Lifestyle): Athlete & team partnerships, creator content & Media, sampling (Recovery Lounge, Tech Playground, Padel court, F1-week cultural halo)

Why We Are Doing This

Connecting brands, teams & innovators

Deals that compound.

Sponsorship Deals & Partnerships
Connect Pro Sports, College Sports & Motorsports teams with wellness & lifestyle consumer brands: community to cultural impact.
Connecting Brand Needs w/ Solutions
Match CMOs & founders with relevant tech and innovation platforms to spark growth.
Brand Halo & Cultural Elevation
Deliver premium experience, team presence, and content capture that lift brand perception and drive conversion.
Itinerary
8:30
Arrival & Welcome
Morning Hyrox Workout
9:30
Panel 1 · The F1 Playbook
Everyone wants the F1 logo. Almost nobody understands the deal behind it. The team, a current partner, and a brand deciding if it's worth the leap.
10:15
BREAK
10:45
Panel 2 · Owning the Customer
As paid acquisition gets brutal, the winners own the customer: retention, loyalty, community, owned channels
11:30
Panel 3 · Punching Above Your Budget
NeuroGum got on Yuki Tsunoda's helmet for less than a trade show booth. Here's how small brands buy outsized attention in motorsport.
12:15
LUNCH · PADEL WITH THE PROSPRESENTED BY
1:45
★ Panel 4 · Tom Brady × Aescape
A fireside on longevity as the next brand frontier, and the live reveal of the Brady Protocol
2:45
Panel 5 · From Viral to Reliable
Going viral is easy. Forecasting, inventory, supply chain, post-purchase. The brands that scaled figured out the boring stuff first.
3:30
Panel 6 · Brand Is the Moat
Brand is the only moat that compounds. The sport and wellness companies that figured this out first, and what every commerce brand can steal from them.
4:15
CLOSING REMARKS · PADEL WITH PROSPRESENTED BY
7:00
★ VVIP Dinner
More than a paddock pass.
